characters.name: Alan
characters.description: Alanis a boy who is friends withChadand kept flirting withJade(andTori) atNozuinTori & Jade's Play Date. In the episode, he and Chad seemed impressed that Tori and Jade went toHollywood Arts. Alan was mostly hitting on Jade, but ended up being rejected multiple times. He tickled Jade on the neck/chin area and saying "Are you ticklish?", leading Jade to elbow him in the gut, and asks Jade what school she goes to. After he and Chad wanted to see Tori and Jade sing, or in their words, do "a little songy song action", Tori and Jade make them leave by singingTake A Hintdedicated to them. He and Chad later show up to Tori and Jade's play. He has only appeared in the episodeTori & Jade's Play Date.

characters.name: Alan

characters.name: Lane Alexander
characters.description: "Oh Luther, Why?"— Lane toLutherinThe Worst Couple Lane Alexanderis the school guidance counselor atHollywood Arts High School. He is portrayed byLane Napper Though Lane seems to be one of the saner employees at Hollywood Arts, though that could hardly be considered an achievement, and has helped students with their problems on occasion, he seems to be a somewhat lazy individual. For example, inThe Great Ping Pong Scam, he bemoaned the fact that students always come to him with their problems, which, asToripointed out, is literally his job. Despite his job, he seems to dislike students who cannot control their emotions, namelyAndréandJade, seeming very annoyed whenever he comes into contact with them. He has also showed reluctance to help students, such as when, in a deleted scene fromTori and Jade's Playdate, he delegatedCatandRobbieto tellRandy Bronsonthat he was expelled from school. He is known to hate backtalk, jumping down Robbie's throat inOne Thousand Berry Ballsfor "sassing" him, something which can often bring him into the conflict with the fiercely independent Vega sisters. He also seems to be very stubborn, refusing to even countenance the notion that Tori didn't hit Jade inStage Fighting, or had even done it accidentally, and insisting that she had anger problems, even as he went out of his way to provoke her, showing that he had already made up his mind about the situation. This, and his attitude inThe Wood, suggests that he is very unforgiving of accidents. He has a bizarre obsession with lotion, near constantly applying it to his hands and having unusual scents, such as bacon or sour cream.

characters.name: Allie
characters.description: Allieis a nine-year old cheerleader and neighbor ofBeckand his family. She is portrayed byAmber Urban. InWi-Fi in the Sky, Allie asked Beck to watch her dog,Sparkleswhile she was at cheerleading practice. WhenJadeforced her way onto the group chat for Beck's screenwriting project, she assumed that the cheerleader was a teenager and barged intoBeck's RVbefore Beck could even begin to explain. When Allie returned for Sparkles, she thanked Beck for watching her dog and expressed the belief that Jade was pretty. A mortified Jade, far from being relieved at no threat to their relationship, instantly exploded at Beck for not telling her that Allie was nine, disconnecting him from his video chat withToriso she could scream at him.

characters.name: Ankimo
characters.description: Ankimois the puppy ofToriandTrina's auntSonyathat appears inThe Wood. He most likely enjoys having his tummy tickled, since Tori asked him, "You want me to tickle your tummy?" According to Tori, he is "the cutest thing ever." This was also used against Tori in the episodeThe Wood.

characters.name: Anthony
characters.description: Anthonyis the music teacher atHollywood Arts High School. He is portrayed byEme Ikwuakor. He gave André a "D" onhis Christmas songinA Christmas Tori. It's unknown if any main characters besides André are in his class and whether Anthony is his first or last name, since André only refers to him as Anthony. In the end,Toriconvinces Anthony to give André an A, and Anthony admits that he was wrong about André's song. Tori also states that she thinks he's "awesome".

characters.name: Aunt Pearl and Uncle Walter
characters.description: Aunt Pearl and Uncle WalterareCat Valentine's aunt and uncle. They are mentioned inStar Spangled Toriwhen Cat says her parents wanted her to live with them while they were in Idaho with her brother. According to Cat, they're very strict and mean, possibly abusive. They don't like Cat's red hair, they only eat vegetables, they don't allow Cat to have unlimited texting, and they don't allow her to flush the toilet unless it's "absolutely necessary".

characters.name: Background Characters
characters.description: There are manybackground charactersinVictoriouswho make cameo appearances. Not much is known about them, and many of them have no speaking roles.

characters.name: Background Characters
characters.description: There are manybackground charactersinVictoriouswho make cameo appearances. Not much is known about them, and many of them have no speaking roles.

characters.name: Barbara
characters.description: BarbaraisBeck's "uncle", mentioned inA Film by Dale Squires. It is implied that Barbara is transgender, although it's also quite possible that Barbara is just very masculine.

characters.name: The Barbershop Quartet
characters.description: The Barbershop Quartetis a group of four boys who appear inBeggin' on Your KneesandTori Goes Platinum. They are inToriandRobbie's singing class, and they enjoy harmonizing with each other. They performed together at the Full Moon Jam, although at first the teacher was only allowing solos and duets. After lots of pleading, the teacher got fed up with them and allowed them to sing as a quartet. They also asked Tori andAndréin turn to "be their very special-" but both declined the offer before the Quartet could finish asking. In the Beggin' on Your Knees photo gallery, Tori says they are touring on an NYC subway because it was better than performing at Dingo Land. Jaime:It can be a solo, or you can pair up with someone in this class and sing a duet. But just solos and duets. Quartet:What about us?!

characters.name: Beck's Aunt
characters.description: In "Locked Up!",Beckmentioned thathis aunthad invited him to her house in Cancun for spring break only to rescind the invitation when she learnt that he was planning to bringJade, suggesting that she, like the rest of Beck's family, doesn't care for Jade. In "Opposite Date", Beck andToritakeBusterto the animal hospital on his aunt's behalf though it is unclear if this is the same aunt who has the house in Cancun or if it may be a different aunt.

characters.name: Beck's Grandma
characters.description: Beck Oliver's grandmothernever appeared inVictoriousbut was mentioned onTheSlap. In theTrending Now!section, when everyone shared what they expected their grandmother to say on Thanksgiving, Beck said his grandma would probably be complaining about The Cheesecake Warehouse discontinuing their senior discount and would be worrying about the poor economy. On TheSlap, Beck also mentioned that he got a jar of maple syrup andDegrassiDVD set from his grandmother for Christmas[citation needed], but it is unknown if he was talking about the same grandma.

characters.name: Shawn Becker
characters.description: Shawn BeckerNameShawn BeckerAge17-18RelationshipsShayna(girlfriend)FriendsTrina VegaPortrayed byEvan Williams Shawn Beckeris a senior student atHollywood ArtswhoTrinahad a crush on in the episodeTori Tortures Teacher. Trina made a pizza for him to impress him.  When she brings the pizza to him, he says that he couldn't eat it, possibly is allergic to/doesn't like green peppers. When Trina brings another pizza with no green peppers then it is revealed that he already has a girlfriend namedShayna.  Trina angrily takes his pizza and smashes it on the wall and yells at him "We're over!" and storms away.  He calls Trina "Tarnie" by mistake more than once. He is portrayed byEvan Williams. His only appearance is inTori Tortures Teacher.

characters.name: Drake Bell
characters.description: Drake Bell Drake Bellis an American actor and singer. He makes an appearance in theVictoriousepisode,April Fools' Blank, The episode starts off in a seemingly normal way in Sikowitz's classroom. Tori tries to prank the class with a fake stub of her arm, but the class yawns it off. They don't really participate in April Fools' Day. Cat uncharacteristically yells at Tori to "shut up and let Mr. Belding teach". He teaches for a bit and knocks Tori down and steals her purse. Then there's a goat on stage, and Robbie floats away in the sky. Drake Bell comes by and help Tori up after she falls from her chair due to Cat's trumpet playing, and Sikowitz explodes. He picks upToriafter she falls off her chair and then he runs away. When Drake Bell runs in and "saves" Tori, Sikowitz asks, "Was that the Bell? He starred inDan Schneider's older showsDrake & Joshand The Amanda Show. It was seen when April Fools' Blank aired, his scene was cut off. Bell, alongside Schneider, also helped write the songFinally Fallingfrom the episodeTori the Zombie.

characters.name: Bella
characters.description: Bellais a brunetteNorthridgegirl who only appears in the episode "Freak the Freak Out". She is a known "Northridge Girl." Her best friend isChristie. Together, they take advantage of hopeless romantics by acting cute on a date and then stealing from them. In "Freak the Freak Out", she andChristiedatedRex, which was an apparent scheme to stealRobbie's money. The two later datedSinjinand stole his watch. It is possible that she could be looked at as a thief. Bella is portrayed byNicole Castillo. Not much is known about Bella's personality except her manipulative habit of dating boys to steal from them.
characters.personality_section: Not much is known about Bella's personality except her manipulative habit of dating boys to steal from them.

characters.name: Sherman Berman
characters.description: Sherman Bermanis a student atHollywood Arts. He is only mentioned onTheSlapinJade's post,[1]"I hate people whose names rhyme. That's right... I'm talking to you Sherman Berman." Given that he did not appear inVictorious, little is known about him. He could be one of Jade's enemies, or she just made up Sherman Berman to prove her point.

characters.name: Bill
characters.description: Billis one of the elderly man whoCattalks to inCat Makes the Elderly Laugh. He does not respond to anything Cat says to him. He lives in a nursing home with Elaine and Parnell just down the street from Cat. Cat tries to make him laugh by pretending they're going to rob a bank together, but it doesn't work and he only gives her a confused look. She also reads him jokes from a 20th-century joke book, but he does not find those funny either, possibly because Cat did not read the entire joke. He has a baby blue PearPhone.

characters.name: Jackie Bonet
characters.description: "Jackie" with her body guard (André). Jackie Bonetis a fake celebrity portrayed byTrina Vega. Her first and only appearance is inWok Star. Her bodyguard is portrayed byAndré.ToriconvincesTrinato help her stallMrs. Leeso the audience won't see her version ofJade'splay, which was a disaster. Mrs. Lee loves to take pictures with the celebrities who visit her restaurant. After refusing to take the photo until she's finished with her dinner and eating with exaggerated slowness (to keep Mrs. Lee from getting to the play), Mrs. Lee grows impatient with her, so to stall her further "Jackie" (Trina) fakes heart confarctions, which only results in Mrs. Lee snapping a picture of them together and then fleeing. She then tells one of the restaurant's waiters to drag Jackie's body out back and say nothing. It is hinted onTheSlapthat Jackie's true identity was later revealed.

characters.name: Brady
characters.description: BradyisSinjin Van Cleef's friend inVictorious. He has only appeared in the episodeJade Dumps Beck. He walks over with Sinjin when Sinjin wants to offer himself asJade's new boyfriend. He has only spoken inSinjin's Profile Video.

characters.name: Brady

characters.name: Brenda
characters.description: BrendaisRobbie's grandmother's friend's cousins's granddaughter. She is a shy and quiet girl who doesn't move from her chair during her visit to Mamaw's.Mamawhopes that she and Robbie will become boyfriend and girlfriend, instead ofCat, who she thinks might be Robbie's future girlfriend. It is possible that Mamaw believed they'd be a good match because Brenda carries around a teddy bear, and Robbie always hasRexby his side; however, this is just speculation. She was introduced inThe Birthweek Songand was never seen again. Brenda is played by Samantha Jordan.

characters.name: Randy Bronson
characters.description: Robbie Shapiro Randy Bronsonis a student atHollywood Arts High Schoolwho only appears in a deleted scene fromTori & Jade's Play Date. He appears to be a school bully. He was in jail for spanking a cop, but then he got out and returns to school.LanewantsRobbieandCatto tell him that he is expelled from HA through theBad News Song. He also likes calypso music. Robbie and Cat sing in calypso style for him, however the two of them ran away because they were afraid. [[Category:Minor Antagonists]|Bronson, Randy]

characters.name: Bunny
characters.description: "Ohhhh! You thought bunny was a rabbit!"— Sikowitz inTori Tortures Teacher Full Name: Bunny

characters.name: Burf
characters.description: "She alright."— Burf toSinjinaboutToriinWanko's Warehouse Burftholomew "Burf" Defectis a student atHollywood Arts. He seems to be good friends withSinjinas he appears with him in several episodes and in many of Sinjin's segments onTheSlap.com. While he made his first physical appearance inTori and Jade's Play Date, he first appeared in the picture gallery on TheSlap forThe Worst Couple.Erwin Sikowitzseems to dislike his haircut and finds him annoying. Nevertheless, in the episodeTori and Jade's Playdate, he hires Burf along with Sinjin to guardToriandJadeatNozufor him, and Burf willingly does so. Burf's character was named based on an inside joke between the main cast[1].

characters.name: Mr. Busey
characters.description: Mr. BuseyisTori's neighbor who likes hanging out in the bushes outside ofthe Vega's house.Mr. Vegatold him that he wasn't allowed in their yard anymore, but inA Christmas Tori, Tori andRobbiespotted him out on the Vega's porch. When Tori told him he wasn't allowed to be there, he said "Aggggh!" He was seen goingChristmas yodelingwithSikowitz,Larry Stein, and others at the end of A Christmas Tori.

characters.name: Buster
characters.description: Busteris the dog from the episodeOpposite Date. He isBeck's Aunt's dog.Beck's aunt needed Beck to take Buster to the pet hospital, Pet Mergency, in Sherman Oaks. Fortunately his medical emergency is not too bad because his nurse, Maureen, says that he "should be as good as new in about a week" and all he needs is some ointment.

characters.name: Care Bears on Fire
characters.description: Care Bears on Fireis a real-life band thatBeckis shown to be interested in. He has a poster of them on the wall of hisRV, shown inJade Dumps Beck.

characters.name: Steven Carson
characters.description: Steven CarsonisToriandCarly's ex-boyfriend. He only appeared iniParty with Victorious. (portrayed by Cameron Stewart) Steven's parents are divorced but share custody. As such, he lives with his mother in Seattle and his father in Los Angeles every other month, resulting in him being home schooled. Three months prior to the crossover, he met and began dating Tori but began cheating on her with Carly Shay a month later when he returned to Seattle, thus also cheating on Tori at the same time. On the surface, Steven is an extremely charming and personable individual, being beloved by seemingly everyone in Carly and Tori's immediate circles, even by the bitterMr. Howardand the self-centeredTrina Vega, with everyone in each city supporting his relationship with both girls. Despite his clever scheme, he appears to be somewhat complacent as he never planned for the simple possibility that Tori and Robbie would post about him on TheSlap. Like most everyone outside of Tori's immediate circle, Steven seems quite confused byJade West, often looking bemused at her more outlandish statements.

Like most everyone outside of Tori's immediate circle, Steven seems quite confused byJade West, often looking bemused at her more outlandish statements.

characters.name: Steven Carson
characters.description: Steven CarsonisToriandCarly's ex-boyfriend. He only appeared iniParty with Victorious. (portrayed by Cameron Stewart) Steven's parents are divorced but share custody. As such, he lives with his mother in Seattle and his father in Los Angeles every other month, resulting in him being home schooled. Three months prior to the crossover, he met and began dating Tori but began cheating on her with Carly Shay a month later when he returned to Seattle, thus also cheating on Tori at the same time. On the surface, Steven is an extremely charming and personable individual, being beloved by seemingly everyone in Carly and Tori's immediate circles, even by the bitterMr. Howardand the self-centeredTrina Vega, with everyone in each city supporting his relationship with both girls. Despite his clever scheme, he appears to be somewhat complacent as he never planned for the simple possibility that Tori and Robbie would post about him on TheSlap. Like most everyone outside of Tori's immediate circle, Steven seems quite confused byJade West, often looking bemused at her more outlandish statements.

characters.name: Cat's Brother
characters.description: "I'm not gonna lie, my brother's pretty weird."—Catabout her brother. Mr. Valentine(father)Mrs. Valentine(mother)Nona(grandmother)Unnamed grandfatherUncle JesseTwo Uncles (unnamed)Cousin JesseAunt Pearl and Uncle Walter Although he has never been seen,Catfrequently mentions her odd and possibly mentally illbrotheras part of a running gag onVictoriousandSam & Cat. He has been the cameraman for a few of Cat's videos onTheSlap.comand has a pet turtle with "special problems".
